title: DOME: Recommendations for supervised machine learning validation in biology
authors: The ELIXIR Machine Learning focus group
snippet: Modern biology frequently relies on machine learning to provide predictions and improve decision processes. There have been recent calls for more scrutiny on machine learning performance and possible limitations. Here we present a set of community-wide recommendations aiming to help establish standards of supervised machine learning validation in biology.
